title: XBot
description: Enterprise workflow orchestration on Apache Airflow. Complex DFOS schemas, IoT data streams, config-driven DAGs, full observability. Built from zero, owns itself in prod.

title: ManEx v3
description: Low-code automation engine. Non-engineers trigger full ETL workflows via JSON. 15+ composable functions: DB ops, API calls, validations, notifications. ~40% faster delivery.

title: DFOS Data Platform
description: Unified data model collapsing complex multi-table schemas into a single queryable layer. 35% SLA improvement via partitioning, backfill strategies, scheduling controls.

title: Kafka Streaming Pipeline
description: Real-time IoT telemetry ingestion via Apache Kafka. Event-driven Airflow triggers. Moving the entire platform from scheduled batch to continuous streaming architecture.
